caption: A video game captures a football game between the Atlanta Falcons and another team on a green grass field within a large stadium. The Falcons players wear black uniforms with red accents. As the play begins, the offensive line engages the defensive line. An on-screen overlay in the bottom left features a man with blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt and headphones. Text in the bottom right of the game screen reads "HOLD THE LINE" and "Away Team has improved blocking." The top scoreboard displays "1st & 10," showing the Falcons leading 6 to 0. The game clock counts down from "1:32" to "1:29," while the play clock decreases from ":14" to ":11." Between the frames, the players collide at the line of scrimmage, and the man in the overlay watches the action with a neutral expression.
